name: Internship Template
subject: Application for Internship at {company}
body:
Hello {company},

My name is {your_name}. I am writing to express my interest in the {role} internship position at your organization.

I have hands-on experience in {skills} and I am actively working on projects like {why}. I would be grateful for an opportunity to contribute and learn.

Attached is my resume for your reference.

Regards,
{your_name}

name: Developer Role Template
subject: Applying for {role} at {company}
body:
Hi {company} Team,

My name is {your_name}, and I am applying for the {role} position. I have strong skills in {skills}, and I have built multiple real-world applications including {why}.

I would love the chance to contribute to your engineering team.

Regards,
{your_name}

name: Research Opportunity Template
subject: Research Collaboration Request - {role}
body:
Respected {company},

My name is {your_name}. I am deeply interested in your work related to {role}. I have skills in {skills} and am working on projects such as {why}.

I would be honored to collaborate or assist in your research.

Regards,
{your_name}

name: Startup Friendly Template
subject: Interested in Contributing to {company}
body:
Hey {company} Team,

I'm {your_name}. I love what you're building! I specialize in {skills}, and I am currently working on {why}.

I’d be super excited to contribute in any way possible as a {role}.

Regards,
{your_name}

name: Follow-Up Template
subject: Following Up on My Application for {role}
body:
Hello {company},

I hope you're doing well. I wanted to kindly follow up regarding my application for the {role} position. I remain very enthusiastic about contributing my skills in {skills}.

Please let me know if you need any additional details.

Regards,
{your_name}
